table-495-495.caption: For all cards illustrated by Jim Pavelec. and describe the text of the ruling of these cards. Do these cards have missing or degraded properties and values.
data: No specific errata; original wording applies fully.
Rulings confirm damage cannot be prevented once resolved.
Text clarifies exile triggers only on death, not sacrifice.
Ruling states counter is mandatory upon resolution regardless of target legality.
Clarified interaction with graveyard recursion in latest Oracle update.
Erratum added to specify timing window for activation during combat.
